_metadata.for_match: Colorado Rapids vs Houston Dynamo FC
_metadata.venue: Dick's Sporting Goods Park, Commerce City, Colorado
_metadata.previous_match_data_at: 2026-04-29 FT: Houston Dynamo FC 2-1 Louisville City FC (AET, Open Cup R16, Sviatchenko 89', Ponce 101')
_metadata.notes: AWAY game at Colorado — Houston travels west. This is a REVENGE GAME: Colorado beat Houston 6-2 at DSGP on April 11 (Kosi Thompson debut brace + Navarro brace). Both teams played Wednesday (Houston: Open Cup vs Louisville — 2-1 AET, tired legs; Colorado: I-25 Derby vs Switchbacks — survived on penalties). Houston MLS record: 4W-0D-5L (12 pts). Colorado: ~4-1-5 (10 pts), 7th West. Colorado form: LOST 1-3 at Vancouver (April 25), won I-25 Derby penalties (April 30). KEY INTEL — Colorado is also tired from Wednesday's cup match. Rest narrative goes both ways. Ponce scored the 101' winner for Houston last night — he is the form striker going in. Guilherme (Augusto on lineup sheets, @guilherme11) tracking 20+ contribution pace. Navarro (7 goals) and Kosi Thompson are the primary threats. HANDLES VERIFIED: Paxten Aaronson @paxten_aaronson8 (43K). Navarro handle UNVERIFIED — confirm before publishing. Thompson handle UNVERIFIED — confirm before publishing. CORRECTION: knowledge.md incorrectly noted Shell Energy as venue — confirmed via Colorado gameday guide and OurSports Central 'Houston Travel West' that it IS at DSGP. Use away guide framing.

matchday_hook: Three weeks ago in Colorado, the Rapids put SIX past Houston. Now Houston comes back to Dick's Sporting Goods Park for a second look — but this is a completely different team walking in. Ponce scored the 101st-minute Open Cup winner last night. Guilherme is tracking a 20-goal pace. Sviatchenko saved the cup run with an 89th-minute equalizer. Both teams played Wednesday. Everybody's tired. But Houston is coming back to Denver with a point to prove. 🧡
vibe_strip_items: ⚡ REVENGE TOUR — Colorado beat Houston 6-2 at this stadium on April 11. Houston is BACK. Same venue, different week, different energy.
🏆 OPEN CUP HANGOVER (the good kind) — Ponce scored in the 101st minute last night. Houston advances to the QF. Now they fly to Colorado on adrenaline.
🔥 Ezequiel Ponce: doubted all season, scored vs El Paso, scored the Open Cup winner in extra time. He is in FORM. Watch out, Colorado.
⭐ Both teams played Wednesday. Houston beat Louisville 2-1 (AET). Colorado survived the I-25 Derby on penalties. Tired legs? Yes. But this is where character shows.
📊 Rafael Navarro has 7 goals this season — he scored TWICE in the 6-2 April 11 win. He is the threat Houston has to stop.
👀 Kosi Thompson: debut brace vs Houston on April 11 (his first MLS start, after less than a week of training). He is NOT a coincidence. Learn the name.
🇺🇸 Paxten Aaronson (@paxten_aaronson8): $7M USMNT midfielder, Brenden Aaronson's little brother, 22 years old — the face of Colorado's rebuild. The famous soccer family, Western Conference edition.
🧡 Guilherme (Augusto on lineup sheets): 9 goal contributions in 7 MLS matches — 20-year club record pace. Neymar's in his DMs. The star power is REAL.
🏔️ DSGP is tough. Colorado is 4-0-1 at home this season. But Houston won their only game at Q2 (Austin) in September 2024 and came back to win at Orlando last month. Away wins are earned here.

hot_posts.handle: @ezequielp9 (check for Open Cup winner celebration post)
hot_posts.description: Scored the 101st-minute extra-time winner to send Houston to the Open Cup Quarterfinal — 2-1 over Louisville City FC. Four continents (Roma, Granada, Spartak Moscow, AEK Athens) before Houston. Was doubted early in the season. Scored vs El Paso. Now the Open Cup hero. Wife Martina (Chilean roots), kids Leon and Rebeca.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Extra-time winner in a cup knockoutn night is the biggest individual moment of the week. He's the form striker going into Colorado.
hot_posts.content_angle: The guy who was doubted delivered when it counted most. 101 minutes. Extra time. Open Cup QF secured. Ponce is that guy. And now he goes to Denver. 🧡

hot_posts.post_date: April 2026 — check for any post-Louisville content
hot_posts.description: Brazilian winger (Augusto on lineup sheets — same player, never assume it's different). 9 goal contributions in 7 MLS appearances — first Dynamo to reach that mark in first 6 MLS matches since Brian Ching in 2006. Neymar praised him publicly. Turned 31 April 13. At Colorado on April 11 he played but was part of the 6-2 collapse — this is a redemption match for the whole team.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Star power + redemption angle + 20-year club record pace.
hot_posts.content_angle: The main character of the team. Coming back to the stadium where his team gave up 6. He is the difference-maker this time.

hot_posts.description: Danish CB who headed home the Héctor Herrera assist in the 89th minute last night to tie it 1-1 vs Louisville, keeping Houston's Open Cup hopes alive. Wife Anne — he previously posted a tribute about how she has helped him through his career.
hot_posts.why_it_works: 89th-minute equalizer by a defender — clutch moment story. The Open Cup wouldn't have happened without him.
hot_posts.content_angle: The man who saved the cup run. 89th minute. Herrera's ball. Sviatchenko's head. One moment that changed everything. 🇩🇰

hot_posts.description: Mexican international legend (Porto captain, Atlético Madrid). Scored on his 36th birthday at Orlando (April 18). Last night provided the assist on Sviatchenko's 89th-minute equalizer. He is playing at a genuinely high level for a 36-year-old. Artur quote: 'Happy to play with him again. He still plays at a high level.'
hot_posts.why_it_works: Club legend making key contributions — the full veteran redemption arc is real.
hot_posts.content_angle: 36 and STILL doing it. Birthday goal at Orlando. Assist for the equalizer in the 89th. Houston's elder statesman is writing a comeback story in real time.

hot_posts.description: Lawrence posted a pitch-side photo with Preslee after the San Diego 1-0 win. Caption: 'Lawrence Ennali Hallelujah!!! 🧡' — posted by the player himself after a win. Preslee Clark is a luxury makeup artist. German-Algerian winger, one of the fastest players in MLS.
hot_posts.why_it_works: Player-posted Inner Circle content = authenticity. Passes the repost test because HE posted it.
hot_posts.content_angle: Introduce Preslee Clark as luxury makeup artist — who she IS. Then the pitch-side win photo. DO NOT lead with 'his girlfriend.'

hot_posts.description: Canadian defender, 23 (born Jan 27, 2003). Acquired from Toronto FC March 26, 2026 for $200K GAM. Scored twice in his FIRST MLS start — a debut brace vs Houston on April 11, just days after joining. Third Rapids player ever to brace on debut. Houston fans saw his name for the first time that day. He is NOT a fluke. Discovery framing: who IS Kosi Thompson and why is he dangerous against Houston specifically?
hot_posts.why_it_works: Debut brace vs Houston is the entire hook. The audience will recognize the name from April 11 (if they watched). If they didn't, this is a great origin story.
hot_posts.content_angle: First week of training. First MLS start. Two goals. Versus Houston. The introduction to a player who introduced himself in the most dramatic way possible.

hot_posts.handle: NEEDS PC VERIFICATION — web search suggests @rafaelnavarro.br but unconfirmed (Sonar-class reliability only)
hot_posts.description: Brazilian DP forward, 25 years old (born April 14, 2000 — just turned 25). 7 goals on the season. Scored his 50th career goal contribution for Colorado Rapids vs Vancouver. SCORED TWICE vs Houston on April 11 — he is the designated threat Houston failed to stop last time. Captain when named for LA Galaxy match. 11 goal contributions in last 9 matches.
hot_posts.why_it_works: The player who hurt Houston last time, back at home, in form. Revenge game setup is automatic.
hot_posts.content_angle: He's 25, Brazilian, just reached a club milestone, and the last time Houston came to DSGP he scored twice. He is the player Houston has to solve.

hot_posts.description: 22-year-old American midfielder. $7M club-record fee — Colorado's biggest-ever signing. USMNT international. Younger brother of Brenden Aaronson (Leeds United/USMNT). Born in Medford, NJ. The face of Colorado's rebuild. Has been delivering — scored a brace vs LAFC for Colorado's first away win of 2026.
hot_posts.why_it_works: American player, famous family, DP status, young and promising — this is the Colorado player the guide audience will actually care about.
hot_posts.content_angle: Brenden Aaronson is the famous one at Leeds. His little brother is carrying the Colorado Rapids at 22. Same family. Different league. Same star power. Paxten is making his own name.

injury_flags.status: AVAILABLE — played 90+ minutes vs Louisville last night (April 29). Fatigue is a factor after extra-time effort.
injury_flags.impact: The form striker. Monitor if he starts or if Olsen rotates given the extra-time load.

injury_flags.status: AVAILABLE — returned from suspension vs Louisville (April 29). Should be fit for Colorado.
injury_flags.impact: Speed and direct running. Key on the counter at DSGP.

injury_flags.status: AVAILABLE but building fitness — came on as sub vs Austin. Day-to-day. Likely managed minutes.
injury_flags.impact: If he can go 90, midfield control improves significantly.

revenge_game_context.april_11_result: Colorado Rapids 6-2 Houston Dynamo FC at DSGP
revenge_game_context.april_11_scorers_houston: Guilherme (own goal watch — verify scorers), unknown
revenge_game_context.hook: Houston gave up 6 at Dick's Sporting Goods Park three weeks ago. They come back with Ponce in form, Lingr back, Sviatchenko stepping up in big moments, and Herrera providing at 36. Colorado is unbeaten at home but just survived penalties on Wednesday. Both teams are tired. The October rematch story starts here.
revenge_game_context.colorado_home_record_2026: Unbeaten at home (4W-0D-1L approx). DSGP is a genuine fortress.
revenge_game_context.altitude_note: Dick's Sporting Goods Park sits at 5,200 feet elevation — opponents typically feel it in the second half. An early Houston lead is the dream scenario.
